description: HITL permission prompt triggers repeatedly for read-only repository inspection commands
reproductionSteps: Submit prompt to inspect repository structure
Agent attempts git log or directory read via terminal
HITL approval dialog blocks execution waiting for manual click
suggestedImprovement: Auto-grant permission for read-only CLI commands and file inspection operations

description: Knowledge Item (KI) search vector lookup experiences cold-start latency > 3.5s on initial query
reproductionSteps: Launch deep research mission in fresh workspace session
Query Knowledge Engine for existing pattern KI
Observe 3.8s delay before vector search returns matching KIs
suggestedImprovement: Pre-warm vector cache during workspace startup background indexing

description: Artifact link paths in markdown outputs use relative paths instead of standard clickable file:// URLs
reproductionSteps: Attempt to click referenced file link
Link fails to open because path lacks absolute file:// scheme
suggestedImprovement: Enforce absolute file:// URL formatting for all generated artifact file references

description: Mission graph plan synthesis executes steps sequentially when nodes have zero mutual dependencies
reproductionSteps: Launch multi-step mission requiring documentation, linting, and diagram generation
Nodes execute strictly sequentially, taking 45s total instead of parallel 15s
suggestedImprovement: Enable DAG parallel branch execution for independent execution nodes

description: Context window sliding window pruner truncates earlier requirements when prompt exceeds 8k tokens
reproductionSteps: Agent triggers reflection due to truncated initial constraints
Requires user manual correction to re-inject truncated acceptance criteria
suggestedImprovement: Implement semantic chunking and summary preservation in sliding window context pruner

description: Command line output line count limit requires multiple pagination iterations for large logs
reproductionSteps: Agent must issue follow-up calls to read full log content
suggestedImprovement: Add auto-summarization tool flag for command outputs exceeding 500 lines
